prestazioni: Supercharged Northstar LH2 4.4L V8 (engine code: LH2) upgraded with a Magnuson TVS2650 supercharger (12 psi boost, replacing the stock 9 psi Eaton M122) paired with a custom heat exchanger from CSF Racing (part #8020) for sustained intake temps below 120°F under full load

Full titanium exhaust system by Armytrix (Valvetronic bypass valves, 3.5" diameter piping, Inconel 625 headers) with a custom X-pipe configuration to eliminate the restrictive factory catalytic converters, reducing backpressure by 42% while retaining OEM-style sound levels at cruising speeds

Precision Turbo & Engine PT8285S turbocharger conversion (for forced-induction swap testing) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Hogan Racing, mated to a Motec M150 ECU with flex-fuel capability, supporting E85 blends for 650+ WHP on 93 octane (stock internals retained with forged Mahle pistons and Carrillo H-beam rods for reliability)
estetica: Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (XLR-specific, not a generic kit) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser, extending track width by 3.2" for aggressive stance and 20% improved downforce at 120 mph

Custom 22" forged BBS LM-R wheels (9.5" front, 11.5" rear) with Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/25 rear) and H&R coilover suspension (3-way adjustable, 2.5" drop) with polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension for razor-sharp handling

Full carbon fiber engine cover and trunk lid by Seibon Carbon, reducing weight by 18 lbs, paired with a custom Alcantara-wrapped dashboard and Recaro Pole Position seats (XLR-specific mounting brackets) for a bespoke, track-ready interior
